content.en:
Ye Tian and Kunwu Supreme returned to the human race.

This time, because Ye Tian participated in the war and won a victory for all races in the universe, the star field of the human race was not divided into a single star field.

For the Terrans, no loss is the greatest gain.

And many cosmic families have more or less lost one or two star fields, which is a big loss.

A star field seems to be just a territory, and it can completely subdue the territory of other small clans, but the star field of the universe clan is not comparable to the star field of the small clan, the star field of a universe clan is very prosperous, and has a complete negotiation system, even if it is evacuated, its losses are still very huge.

Ye Tian helped the Terran this time, so after coming back, the high-level leaders of the Terran were ready to give Ye Tian some rewards.

this day.

A notice from the Terrans sent to the Heavenly Pavilion.

For the first time, Ye Yu came to Ye Tian.

"Brother, it's a good thing!"

Ye Yu ran in front of Ye Tian very excitedly and said excitedly.

"What's going on, so excited?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

"Brother, look, this is an invitation from the Holy City, inviting our Heavenly Pavilion to become a member of the Holy City!"

Ye Yu said excitedly.

"An invitation to the Holy City?"

Ye Tian took the invitation letter from Ye Yu's hand, opened it, and carefully browsed it.

The invitation has the aura of the Holy City Lord and the imprint of the Terrans, and it is a real invitation, not a forgery.

"Brother, I heard that the Holy City is extremely strict about the entry of forces, and all those who can enter the Holy City are basically some dominant-level forces and branches of the nine supreme-level forces, and there are only a handful of overlord-level forces that can enter the Holy City, and they belong to the kind of overlord-level forces with a deep background and unlimited potential, but our Heavenly Pavilion is not even a nine-star force now, but I didn't expect to receive an invitation from the Holy City!"

Ye Yu was very excited.

Once settled in the Holy City, the development of the Heavenly Pavilion was completely different, and its reputation was far beyond what it is now, and its status was naturally more transcendent.

You must know that even the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce, the second largest force in Tianlan Giant City, is not qualified to enter the Holy City.

If allowed, the Gao He Chamber of Commerce would even be willing to give up half of its net worth in exchange for the opportunity to enter the Holy City, but this opportunity is too difficult.

"The high-level of the human race is really generous, and they even allowed the Heavenly Pavilion to enter the Holy City!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

He knew very well that it should be his victory in the galaxy-level battle and the benefits won by the Terrans, coupled with the help of the Kunwu Supreme, that the major forces of the Terran agreed to this plan, otherwise if a few forces did not agree, the Heavenly Pavilion would not be able to break the rules and enter the Holy City.

After all, it's a back door!

"Xiaoyu, it's indeed a good thing, let's get ready, the Tiange headquarters is going to be relocated again, but Tianlan Giant City also has to set up a branch here, after all, the business and territory here can also bring huge benefits to Tiange, don't give up easily!"

Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes!"

Ye Yu happily went to arrange.

And the news that Tiange was about to move into the Holy City quickly spread to the major forces of Tianlan Giant City.

For a moment, many forces were stunned.

High River Chamber of Commerce.

One of the founders, Lord Takagawa, was also extremely surprised when he heard the news.

"How can this be the case, I wanted to let the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce live in the Holy City before, and I was willing to pay a lot of money just to open a branch, but this proposal was rejected by those guys, how can I let Tiange settle in the Holy City now? The potential of the Ten Thousand Law True Monarch is indeed very amazing, but it is far from growing up now!"

The Takagawa Juggernaut was intrigued.

There were many curious people like Lord Takagawa, but none of them knew why the Holy City and the Terran hierarchy would agree to such a thing.

And some forces were furious, such as the Ten Light Sword Sect.

The headquarters of the Ten Light Sword Sect.

The Lord of the Ten Lights was truly angry and smashed many things.

"Why is the Heavenly Pavilion?, damn it, last time because of the matter of the Heavenly Pavilion, our Ten Lights Sword Sect suffered heavy losses, but I didn't expect the weak Heavenly Pavilion to enter the Holy City now, that is the place that our Ten Lights Sword Sect dreamed of entering!"

The Lord of the Ten Lights shouted.

But he was just a master, even if he was not weak among the masters, he was not qualified to meddle in the affairs of the Holy City, so he could not prevent the Heavenly Pavilion from entering the Holy City.

Therefore, he can only lose his temper here, and there is no other way.

......

Half a month later.

Tiange officially settled in the Holy City, and found a good place in the Holy City as its headquarters, although it is not as big as the Tiange headquarters in Tianlan Giant City, but in the Holy City, as long as it occupies a place, it is already quite good.

Ye Tian was also busy dealing with the matter of Tiange's entry into the Holy City, and constantly befriended some forces in the Holy City.

At the same time, he also had a basic understanding of the power of the Holy City.

In the Holy City, the strongest force is the Holy Palace, which is another name for the City Lord's Mansion.

The Holy Mansion is one supreme one day and one day, and it belongs to the same family, which can be regarded as a door and one supreme one day.

What Tianzun said was the Deputy City Lord Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable, and the Supreme was talking about the Holy Heavenly Supreme, who was very powerful, second only to the Kunwu Supreme.

Under the Holy Mansion, there are the Hall of Reward and Punishment, the Flame Heavenly Palace, the Phantom Heavenly Palace, the Empress Palace, and the Four Heavenly Gates, which are also known as the One Palace, Three Palaces and Four Heavenly Gates.

Among them, one of the hall masters of the Hall of Reward and Punishment is the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable, so the Holy Punishment Heavenly Venerable can be regarded as belonging to the two forces, and the rights in some aspects of the Holy City are not weaker than the city lord at all.

The palace master of the third palace is also Tianzun, and Ye Tian knows the palace master of the Agni Fire Heavenly Palace, Agni Tianzun, and has dealt with the Agni Heavenly Venerable.

The palace master of the Illusory Heaven Divine Palace is the Illusory Tianzun, who is proficient in illusion, and the Empress Palace is a Tianzun-level force established entirely by women, and the palace master is known as the first empress of the human race, also known as the Empress Tianzun!

The Four Heavenly Gates are the four Heavenly Gates that guard the four directions of the Holy City, and these four Heavenly Gates belong to the City Lord's Mansion, but they are self-managed, have heavy troops, and have a large number of Terran troops.

Therefore, the strength of the Four Heavenly Gates cannot be underestimated, and it is the most dominant force in the Holy City, but there is no Heavenly Venerable to guard it.

But even so, Tianzun did not dare to underestimate the Four Heavenly Gates, the Four Great Heavenly Gates had a powerful battle formation, and when combined with them, it was enough to fight beyond the level.

After that, there is the branch power of the nine supreme level forces in the Holy City, although it is only a small part of the forces, it should not be underestimated.

A force like Tiange is definitely not in the Holy City, and it can even be said to be the weakest force, but as long as it enters the Holy City, it will be easier for Tiange to develop.

Many inheritances and scarce resources that are difficult to obtain in the outside world are readily available in the Holy City.

Moreover, if you cultivate in the Holy City, your cultivation speed is much faster than that of the outside world.

In short, the Holy City is definitely the most prosperous divine city of the Terrans, and it is also the core of the Terrans!
